ideal_must_detect.matched_text: A Board meeting is scheduled on 22-06-2026 to consider audited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26 and a final dividend; the trading window for designated persons is closed from 01-06-2026 until 48 hours after the outcome is disseminated to the stock exchanges in accordance with the PIT Regulations.

UPSI currently includes the draft results pack, negotiation of a term sheet with Samudra Growth Fund I (Category II AIF) for a preferential issue up to INR 180 crore at an indicative price of INR 142 per equity share, and the proposed acquisition of Pavanika Wind Farms Private Limited; no selective disclosure is permitted and any Board-approved item will be disclosed within 30 minutes under Regulation 30(6) read with Schedule III of the LODR Regulations.

Any personal data breach involving data principals shall be escalated to the DPO within 6 hours; notification obligations under the DPDPA to the Data Protection Board and affected individuals will be evaluated case-by-case.
closed from 01-06-2026 until 48 hours after the outcome is disseminated
Ms. Rhea Bhandarkar, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
retain only as long as necessary
do not collect Aadhaar or biometrics for scholarships
process GSTINs only for statutory invoicing
shall not be repurposed for profiling or marketing
name, organisation, purpose, and time of sharing

must_detect.matched_text: A Board meeting is scheduled on 22-06-2026 to consider audited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26 and a final dividend; the trading window for designated persons is closed from 01-06-2026 until 48 hours after the outcome is disseminated to the stock exchanges in accordance with the PIT Regulations.

UPSI currently includes the draft results pack, negotiation of a term sheet with Samudra Growth Fund I (Category II AIF) for a preferential issue up to INR 180 crore at an indicative price of INR 142 per equity share, and the proposed acquisition of Pavanika Wind Farms Private Limited; no selective disclosure is permitted and any Board-approved item will be disclosed within 30 minutes under Regulation 30(6) read with Schedule III of the LODR Regulations.

Any personal data breach involving data principals shall be escalated to the DPO within 6 hours; notification obligations under the DPDPA to the Data Protection Board and affected individuals will be evaluated case-by-case.
